tooltips.title: ui_globals, B690111648A4AB964B890A9482DFA55A, ECHO Nav
tooltips.text: ui_globals, 42A0ABD541EBCE9DBB3A1A8DAED79E02, The Grapple Grabber isn't just for Grapple Points! You can grab explosives from afar for easy chucking, and some enemies are susceptible to grabbing. Grab on the go!

tooltips.title: ui_globals, 69F6E2614CFA1C9FBDAF8F9B54EF5ADA, ECHO Nav
tooltips.text: ui_globals, FAB4A0284DA195C47A0FFB8592C6703F, Sure, there's no fall damage, but why not use Glide so you can fall... smoother?

tooltips.title: ui_globals, D0E1808A450CC62664F8D492EF9209FD, Enemies
tooltips.text: ui_globals, 06BE4125491B76DC5C932FB031D1B7DA, Enemies in the game may have elemental resistances and vulnerabilities not indicated on their health bar. Sneaky bastards!

tooltips.title: ui_globals, 05B22AE54747B7F32C1CADA480FE2312, Enemies
tooltips.text: ui_globals, B28443F44233FF698BE0FBADA7A6CF16, Badass enemies drop better loot and grant more XP than a normal enemy. They're tough, but worth it!

tooltips.title: ui_globals, 7B4E9F9B4DEA25FFAF575980FED497D4, Death and Checkpoints
tooltips.text: ui_globals, D9552DF740F2BC8D64563EB4B1B4A12D, Kill an enemy in Fight For Your Life mode to revive yourself with a Second Wind! You can do this, peanut!

tooltips.title: ui_globals, 119F661045CE81F766174580DDD86D53, Death and Checkpoints
tooltips.text: ui_globals, FC333A534DAACD9E95A9BF948357765B, Revived players recover with 90% of their Shields and 20% of their Health. You're welcome!

tooltips.title: ui_globals, 78F5D85E4BA1D05BE2BEB4AC55F42016, Death and Checkpoints
tooltips.text: ui_globals, 563CE57148CCA25B04D495A9A0C444D0, Multiple Players can attempt to revive you simultaneously! This will not only speed up the Revive Timer, but make you feel special and loved.

tooltips.title: ui_globals, FF4A7EFC42A0EFED04D75D8601AB70ED, Weapon
tooltips.text: ui_globals, D7DB80FA4CE680932F1BDB946BD06715, Daedalus weapons are known for accuracy and reload speed.

tooltips.title: ui_globals, 81B0DBFF43F0B847A5E510908189EC0B, Vending Machine
tooltips.text: ui_globals, 0C9F00664740127426DD6BBF7CF2C2B0, The "Items of the Day" can be purchased from a Vending Machine near you! Act fast before today becomes yesterday!

tooltips.title: ui_globals, 66D377F54915C3787E44EDBBAB393F81, Enemies
tooltips.text: ui_globals, BE545DA24477E18EB229E494BB34F660, Stuck because enemies are too tough? Try completing side quests and challenges to gain experience. Level up and get back out there!

tooltips.title: ui_globals, 41222EE74697CD9EBED818B0AE7C1B2B, Enemies
tooltips.text: ui_globals, A327EA6448D86EC2568A0C9B1FAFAAC2, Did you know? Most enemies on Kairos don't do a lot of cardio. If all else fails, you can always run away. You know, like a coward!

tooltips.title: ui_globals, 6992BACB420708C5A7C84686DFD54117, Enemies
tooltips.text: ui_globals, 0DD0A65347EEAA4134D00DA4090C7C37, Some enemies are resistant to certain damage types (that's why you keep seeing "RESIST" instead of those big damage numbers you want). Unless you're very patient (or stubborn), try switching weapons.

tooltips.title: ui_globals, 0DD6D7CF4730DB940F428DAF4BE1979E, Enemies
tooltips.text: ui_globals, F5DDA8A944AF6FE88CF790B67A2B02DB, Some enemies will use something called "tactics" to make it harder to kill them, by taking cover or helping teammates. Is it fair? Absolutely not. Is it annoying? You bet. What are you gonna do about it?

tooltips.title: ui_globals, 66CFF3D640AC8B9DCA29B2B67E8DD57B, Vehicles
tooltips.text: ui_globals, A5105E0B4B7134738CAA12B175267066, Feet too slow? Hop in a vehicle to free yourself from your meat-bound chains.

tooltips.title: ui_globals, 60DCACAF435B49BA5D9E648856EF6A8D, Movement
tooltips.text: ui_globals, BF15BBC64E17704E2DB55787AE2044CF, Get a grip! Keep an eye open for grapple points to get you across gaps or atop high ledges quickly!

tooltips.title: ui_globals, 58BFFD774450D1738E440090F4C8C3B2, Movement
tooltips.text: ui_globals, B195A1134973DD75F30A2E9663DA7350, Too tall to fit? Crouch to get low.

tooltips.title: ui_globals, 0F99F0584599ABB420ADFE9C59831EA8, Movement
tooltips.text: ui_globals, 6B87D70C43DFAC72FCD479A2228D97ED, When one jump just won't cut it, try double jump.

tooltips.title: ui_globals, 13886EC0412F14021FBDD29FD286274D, Movement
tooltips.text: ui_globals, 3223219B45F4BF8C231AC5A4F4CFCA7B, Try sliding to make it harder for enemies to hit you as you move, or just to have fun!

tooltips.title: ui_globals, D8995F9D44B1DCBB3B6858A68BD3E0BC, Combat
tooltips.text: ui_globals, F1856ECC44229319D8E6B7B3849CD333, Your shields will automatically recover after a few seconds without taking damage. Just get behind something and be patient!

tooltips.title: ui_globals, 70857A994713379375C4C89A2C57334A, Combat
tooltips.text: ui_globals, FC05B62C4933107C65D30BA4B5D9182F, Guns, grenades, melee, action skills–there's lots of fun ways to kill the bad guys. Try pushing lots of buttons!

tooltips.title: ui_globals, 8996F6A64EC29C9AAB4A278DD5867829, Combat
tooltips.text: ui_globals, 8CA7DB2D48F1BFD5CCBBE59C414517CF, Need to hurt something, but out of ammo? Try using melee! Sure, it may be extremely short-range, but you'll never run out fists!

tooltips.title: ui_globals, 1E81C63B4229AC268960C28A8410140B, Combat
tooltips.text: ui_globals, CBD738D247B9CED1C786B280407BCA6F, Don't know where an enemy's crit spot is? Try shooting them all over! You'll probably either find it or kill them in the process.

tooltips.title: ui_globals, 71DFCED64F804BFF62D22EB4237AA94C, Combat
tooltips.text: ui_globals, A8C9C73746A42701AC65338F593453E5, If you run out of ammo, reload or switch guns! If you run out of, like, ALL your ammo, I dunno, use your fists or something? You're probably screwed, but, worth a shot.

tooltips.title: ui_globals, E35BC02C4953CB616CCAB9BF5E750A08, Combat
tooltips.text: ui_globals, 6A4AC8014625DE5F87E96E9D5B6E92A5, Incendiary damage is extra effective against red health bars (Flesh). Make sure to burn your enemies evenly on all sides!

tooltips.title: ui_globals, 0B2367F9480D53D372022E8A9DB340CC, Combat
tooltips.text: ui_globals, BFFCA49D446F340DA4ADF0ACC0379D23, Shock damage is extra effective against blue health bars (Shields). Make short work with a short circuit!

tooltips.title: ui_globals, 4A68154D4E41E52DD37B9D941BDD0ACF, Combat
tooltips.text: ui_globals, 09EEDEE0444A33FF1591D1BE16EC8417, Corrosive damage is extra effective against yellow health bars (Armor). Melt 'em down!

tooltips.title: ui_globals, DBB583814DEA974A1BD81CBDAAF0B938, Combat
tooltips.text: ui_globals, 5AD4D7184C566F41689BD5A44D9F8E5C, Why does "IMMUNE" keep popping up when you shoot that one enemy with that one weapon? Because they're immune, you big silly! Try another damage type! Or another enemy, I guess!

tooltips.title: ui_globals, 2D92D4C940DD373677D0AEAFF728248F, Combat
tooltips.text: ui_globals, 7879C2AA4B691F1BF92889829F8EE58A, When you see a skull next to an enemy's name, that means they're a much higher level! You'll probably die if you fight them, but man, if you win? You'll be a legend.

tooltips.title: ui_globals, 2DFE3D344D5ECD56269C18AA6131F1C7, General
tooltips.text: ui_globals, 0E90A33F4CD9F1B28ED68AA456029F5D, Water is no match for the awesome power of swimming!

tooltips.title: ui_globals, FBEEC8AE405074EB5082108BE405A69B, General
tooltips.text: ui_globals, 787E57DE4EBC46FAFB03CCA02C110DBE, Climb on stuff. Go ahead. No one will be mad.

tooltips.title: ui_globals, CCAD6015441318C228F9FB95A113D032, General
tooltips.text: ui_globals, 9ADE66BC4B4AF943A43101BDBE403C0E, If you're having a tough time, consider getting better at the game! Or, adjust the difficulty in the Options menu. Either works.

tooltips.title: ui_globals, 7EAC2A9C46AE069E9C8EB08B1D56D3EC, General
tooltips.text: ui_globals, 9E9DE7D4479378F62446BC998695D1A0, Loot rarity is color-coded. From common to legendary, the order goes White, Green, Blue, Purple, Orange. Just remember: Warm Glands Bleed Pleasing Ooze!

tooltips.title: ui_globals, 50FE27724C7D326CA26AEE83B3AAB7FF, General
tooltips.text: ui_globals, E52BCF204FD25CC510A361984E9C9EE4, Some items have a li'l bit of cheeky red text in their description. Usually, this means it does something cool and unique! Or maybe someone just REALLY likes that one band!

tooltips.title: ui_globals, B13946FB4AC73C66789A88A94918FD6E, General
tooltips.text: ui_globals, F4E4B07E4FAF1F6B281E08A296A0AB8F, Did you know? There are more atoms of hydrogen in a SINGLE water molecule than there are stars in the ENTIRE solar system!

tooltips.title: ui_globals, 45B9B45E409E36EE66CFE496DF00AFB6, General
tooltips.text: ui_globals, 56D062F848E3533F7C8360AB0870F6FB, Curious about Borderlands lore? Well, basically, it all started with some aliens who left a bunch of guns and monsters locked up, and didn't label which was which...

tooltips.title: ui_globals, 8F7A81604748DD9858A91BB6BA9385D1, General
tooltips.text: ui_globals, E351EBC542338F8AE27FB3BFC2CEB6DB, You must be weary from your adventures. Come, warm yourself by this loading screen tip and rest awhile, traveler.

tooltips.title: ui_globals, 8E708EB9481739EEF50929B124502885, General
tooltips.text: ui_globals, B2401122431ECE7E7457A5A7825E7959, Did you know? Thanks to modern science, we now know that most trains need as many as EIGHT "chuggas" before a "choo-choo"!

tooltips.title: ui_globals, 1A383125449AE9BC0835958288A8DFFC, Weapons
tooltips.text: ui_globals, 7D020A514C450135C4CA108135A561B7, Jakobs weapons have lower ammo capacity, but deal high damage. Make every shot count!

tooltips.title: ui_globals, D5407D2241B277131D8442A2859A992C, Weapons
tooltips.text: ui_globals, BF70E97549BC446BB960B2836ECA3A13, Maliwan weapons deal elemental damage and can inflict status effects, which is the damage version of arriving fashionably late.

tooltips.title: ui_globals, B545CB4E469C91C7E2AF498D00DF6EE4, Weapons
tooltips.text: ui_globals, 47B9948B41DBCF603B9F1BA65E83F4A0, Hyperion weapons project a protective shield while you aim. Aim down sights to stay in the fight!

tooltips.title: ui_globals, 61561E5B47E0770EE59F468536E88686, Weapons
tooltips.text: ui_globals, 11ACA1BC44FEA760DDCB7085DA6553A6, Torgue weapons are always explosive. You know, in case you can't decide between bullets and bombs.

tooltips.title: ui_globals, FA27F8594282A0CECBBAECA97EC8E090, Weapons
tooltips.text: ui_globals, 4F22F36548B4115F3B115AB6518E93EA, Atlas weapons' bullet can home in on a tracking shot. Never miss your shot again! Assuming you don't miss the tracker shot. That'd be embarrassing...

tooltips.title: ui_globals, 5B1979734A53DDC911744EBB2569C362, Weapons
tooltips.text: ui_globals, A7EFD06848ECD1D1CD2300BB83BDC0AD, Tediore guns have special effects when they reload (and reload extra fast). Ever wanted a gun you can throw like a grenade, or that walks around, or talks? If not, too bad!

tooltips.title: ui_globals, 2D1DCC7441E0031631991EBDEE54FF9C, Weapons
tooltips.text: ui_globals, 48DA81B9457C161830F749A0CFA7BEA0, Some manufacturers' guns license parts from another manufacturer! What is this, a crossover episode?

tooltips.title: ui_globals, 4A2706AF47D150DB14F9D599AE37ABAB, Weapons
tooltips.text: ui_globals, 634091F246829CE70AFEDDAC2D9B728D, Sure, it's cool to have a theme, but if all your guns use the same ammo, you'll probably run out of bullets sooner than you'd like. Mix it up!

tooltips.title: ui_globals, 0A2B203D4A61D910A92FFB8406CEAF12, Weapons
tooltips.text: ui_globals, CF10653042288B7295D90986A633F2BB, Vladof weapons have an extra gun, built into the gun! It's like dual-wielding, but requires far less hand-eye coordination!

tooltips.title: ui_globals, 92AEE4FE433B4C9FD276519023090220, Weapons
tooltips.text: ui_globals, 0E37455C47CE2EFC87C6BC810A7872FE, Your enemies level up, why shouldn't your guns? Update your arsenal every few levels to keep up with the bad guys!

tooltips.title: ui_globals, 84B2C9A2410D0D804E08438FE15C02DF, General
tooltips.text: ui_globals, D71A0D2748641FA4570F7BB012AD635D, Loot and hang onto valuable gear, even if you don't need it. You can always sell it for cold, hard, digital, fictional cash.

tooltips.title: ui_globals, 61CEEC3B4189E53E7C8975A5FFA568BD, Weapons
tooltips.text: ui_globals, A62BAB6740C96DE7420B2DB51A7E0F74, Want to carry more ammo? Of course you do! Earn ECHO Tokens by completing in-game activities and gathering collectibles, then spend them on upgrades for your ammo capacity!

tooltips.title: ui_globals, BC5028C04FC9864EDFB8C8981EF8C348, Weapons
tooltips.text: ui_globals, 0C5476BB42FB01BE9ABF848C1B552DBB, Ordnance regenerates over time, so you never have to worry about running out of grenades again! Blow up everything! Blow it up twice, if you're feeling zesty!

tooltips.title: ui_globals, 6328BEFD491838A53959629337A7BC46, Weapons
tooltips.text: ui_globals, E63A3076489BF14370C1AE97F62BBECF, Ripper weapons take a moment to get going, but once they do, they fire continuously with no need to reload! For a while, anyway.

tooltips.title: ui_globals, E28EBA4F4B25671E7BA90AA60D0C8761, Weapons
tooltips.text: ui_globals, F7EF811C4CC482C37304EDA51D5CC920, Tired of that rocket launcher taking up your precious gun slots? Introducing... Ordnance! Ordnance is a special slot, for special gear, that makes special huge explosions. You're welcome!

tooltips.title: ui_globals, 6074189F40B5AC1DDF56CCB49273E77A, General
tooltips.text: ui_globals, B8CB8F8045D00FD0C6DAD7883EFF78D3, This is your reminder to stand up, stretch, and hydrate!

tooltips.title: ui_globals, D99CA25D40F71EE346EB2DBD0F4E99AB, Enemies
tooltips.text: ui_globals, 4B76F1A6437E0701323801922BC70EE1, Remember, if you take too much damage, you die. Avoid taking damage to continue playing the game!

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 77262E2C4A90085C5CD8A6BDE0A57962, Use [glyph]Action_Move[/glyph] while jumping against a ledge to climb!

expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 67AC9FD44AA0ACD32D906D8F95C516EF, Use [glyph]Action_Move[/glyph] while jumping against a ledge to climb!

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 289C0C6740B5C7F29BBFCAA65CE735FC, Use [glyph]Action_Crouch[/glyph][glyph]Action_CrouchOrDash[/glyph] to crouch!

expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, ACD4A7E045B3D15C20DA9FA299ACAD46, Use [glyph]Action_Crouch[/glyph][glyph]Action_CrouchOrDash[/glyph] to crouch!

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 73F09D284A8792FD5717D19CA167D680, Use [glyph]action_jump_holdtoglide[/glyph] twice to double jump!

expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 191671F042F080366EB62BBB70824BC3, Use [glyph]action_jump_holdtoglide[/glyph] twice to double jump!

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 246FA4D94A575A3FBD08B9B739AAEC87, Use [glyph]Action_Melee[/glyph] towards a grapple point to grapple!

expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, EA25637C415933F94EAC92BCA0376198, Use [glyph]Action_Melee[/glyph] towards a grapple point to grapple!

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 30C807574731364A6014A59706B6E143, Use [glyph]action_jump_holdtoglide[/glyph] to jump!

expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, C8D81D8641DDBD91BD6E1389704363CA, If you like jumping please jump with  [glyph]action_jump_holdtoglide[/glyph]  [newline] It will be super helpful in navigating the vertical areas of the game - of which there are many. [newline] HAVE A GOOD TIME!

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 2F20173845D9CFCDC8151BBD60970C0F, Use [glyph]action_look[/glyph] to look around!

expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, BA591D564D65B785036B41AC9ECA6A4A, Use [glyph]action_look[/glyph] to look around!

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, A1883FA0432073909C2634B4C5ADE9C5, Press and hold [glyph]Action_Use[/glyph] to Revive your allies!

expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 3D4DFC2741F5E001257EFF91B45EC63A, Press and hold [glyph]Action_Use[/glyph] to Revive your allies!

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 3186FCD342507C0B1F53F984F38AF00D, Shields protect you from dying!

expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 5B121E9C435353173A5D679D04D02B4E, Shields protect you from dying!

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 9AF40C344855CA2DF79EC890E1EAB90F, Use [glyph_special]Action_Move[/glyph_special] to walk!

expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, A221E98A4FAB47B766F0BCA900FDB062, Use [glyph_special]Action_Move[/glyph_special] to walk! While walking, use [glyph]Action_Sprint[/glyph] to run.

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 8CAB572A43A0C169ACD19AA8F1AEAE96, Use [glyph]Action_Fire[/glyph] to fire your Weapon!

expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, E9055A994CC604F6A44FB595A9C3771F, Use [glyph]Action_Fire[/glyph] to fire your Weapon!

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 7951F0EE4609AA8AF593B58617DFEEDD, Use [glyph]Action_Reload[/glyph] to reload your gun!

expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 3F71973C4290524C0FA3DB8D7407A55D, Use [glyph]Action_Reload[/glyph] to reload your gun!

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 7933FA214BFF752FCAF28090074435F9, Use [glyph]Action_PingLocations[/glyph] to activate ECHO-4's ECHO Location and ping interesting locations around you!

expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, F6E7DCA34778124B6AD6C7B03598076B, When you use [glyph]Action_PingLocations[/glyph], ECHO-4 will ECHO Locate and ping nearby interesting locations. ECHO-4 will also digistruct a path toward your active objective.

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 48D971DF40E99C3DC64C95AED950E50F, Safehouses are yours to capture! Find the Keycode, open the Safehouse, and reach the Command Console!

expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 6FD96AA348E99EC3E98718ACFEB37525, If you like houses and being safe, then Safehouses are for you!  Find the Keycode to open the Safehouse, and then use the Command Console to claim it as your own! Captured Safehouses reward you with SDU Tokens to expand your Inventory.

tutorialdef.header: ui_globals, F7D7CC61460743E43C87D38000AE3990, The Safehouse is yours!
tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, B3D17C78495E7049CAC6339B29014FD9, You've captured your first Safehouse for the Crimson Resistance! Enjoy access to a new Fast Travel Station and Vending Machines!

expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 0A7E0F1F44DE4929DBF532BB579A26A3, You've captured your first Safehouse for the Crimson Resistance, and now friendly civilians will populate the area. You've also earned SDU Tokens as a reward! With each new captured Safehouse, your Fast Travel network will grow, as will the strength of the Crimson Resistance.

tutorialdef.header: ui_globals, E386872646F282DF3EB4418D50E310E4, Who left this here?
tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 58331CB946BDFDC3076374AF9FCEBB1F, You've found a Crimson Resistance Supply Cache! Too bad it's encrypted. You'll have to carry it to a Safehouse to decrypt and open it!

expandedtutorialdef.header: ui_globals, FF69DDD4462632000081B9B93227678A, Who left this here?
expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 7F25E5B24E19C106987373BD6CA8F059, You found a Crimson Resistance Supply Cache... here of all places! Too bad you can't open it here. You'll have to carry the encrypted capsule to a Safehouse where it can be decrypted. Remember, when you see one set of footprints, it was you, carrying the capsule a great distance for great reward.

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 9D4551E3471127BF10EFE29041150A71, Unburden yourself of that carryable. Place the capsule into this decrypt station and earn your just rewards!

expandedtutorialdef.header: ui_globals, B658379543CF89BA38438EA0D5B7F21F, Vive la Crimson Résistance!
expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, BBC12460426AA925456CAE8EA9A7F1D6, You've made it all this way. Now, place the capsule in decrypt station to unlock its glorious contents. Use the goods you recover to keep up the fight for the Crimson Resistance!

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 0316BB304C3920C6FB6576A0E6EA1418, A symbol of resistance in a place where Vault Hunting is outlawed. Take heart. You are not alone.

expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 4887F4AB4174E28867AE17B6C4123C38, Who placed these symbols here, and when? Perhaps it doesn't matter. Its very existence here speaks of resistance against the Timekeeper. Interact with the Vault Symbols to increase your capacity to resist.

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 085714FF4D9D7BB2C89AA883E2425849, Someone placed, dropped, stashed, or unceremoniously tossed this audio recording here. Use ECHO-4 to take a listen!

expandedtutorialdef.header: ui_globals, B0AC3FC6408FF1068FDFC6AA31F01C7A, It's an ECHO Log!
expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 9EDDFD4B4A920F4B40B6E78EC7B4C8E0, You'll find ECHO logs scattered throughout the world of Kairos. How any one ECHO log ends up where it does is questionable, but the contents are often juicy little nuggets of audio entertainment. Like listening in on a call. Or reading a diary. So go ahead, use your ECHO-4 to get your voyeur on!

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, F8ABC881479A3B459341079096292751, You found one of Arjay's Vault Hunter logs. Use ECHO-4 to scan and play it.

expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, B8CE0CD247F17ADCF2FA629A2569548B, Arjay, your aspiring Vault Hunter friend and prison pal, traveled across Kairos, leaving helpful observations and tips behind. Use ECHO-4 to scan and play the logs when you locate them.

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 3265650348F7BECE338AD0A0E5266D0C, You found a... bolt! Use ECHO-4 to scan the bolts of departed souls and discover their parting thoughts.

expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 6ED600044C6BC9EECE84C19ED6E5EF96, A certain butterfly is already on the wing. Use ECHO-4 to scan the bolts of departed souls and discover their parting thoughts. What wisdom awaits that may help a Vault Hunter on their journey?

tutorialdef.header: ui_globals, B18961E543914A950F15FAB8B5C6B457, From Nyr and far
tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 8BA85C2D4E425CD520B7CE999664D087, A message has been left here. To unlock it, find the three Memordium Orbs and activate the Evocarium. You'll be awarded SDU tokens as well.

expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 0675D8A640186B5FF8B5348D21FD5254, A message has been left here. Find and collect the three Memordium Orbs to unlock the Evocarium and obtain the secrets within. You'll be awarded SDU tokens as well.

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, A940260945CDFA9F4346768C8F1F257B, Pray at this shrine to disperse the spirits of the past contained within and earn it's SDU tokens.

expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, CB1A558542A679E635F9B88B4EFE2698, Many have come to Kairos. Some left behind their relics, rituals, and shrines. Pray here to pay respect to those that came before. Disperse their spirits to imbue yourself with power and earn its SDU Tokens.

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 49D15EDF4E87E56AEF44B8A2E0FD0917, Looks like you've found yourself a nice little cache of goodies. Open it up to reveal its rewards and SDU tokens.

expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 97E9270D4A7156F31F184AB7A48D1CC5, Looks like you've found yourself a nice little cache of goodies. It'd be a shame to let it all go to waste, right? Especially when a Vault Hunter like you can put it to good use. So go ahead, kick it open and reveal its rewards and SDU tokens! No shame in your game!

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 9C68CB3A4E3CF7C1D5841E8CF8228CF1, It's an Electi safe, so you know it's got the goods. Crack the code and kick 'er open to earn its rewards and SDU tokens!

expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, E27F748D46EC8FC58C935E9FFFB48BEA, It's an Electi safe, so you know it's got the goods. If you want these goods to be your goods, you'll have to crack the code and kick 'er open to earn its rewards and SDU tokens!

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 6FB80C444A9C88A23F0238B8D3B3B80C, Take back the airwaves! Defend ECHO-4 from attack as it hacks the Order's Propaganda system.

expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, D35FD4134C3C6AB2491C77B9943780A7, Who knows how long the people have had to listen to this Order 'Prop' garbage? Give 'em something new to listen to – the sound of resistance! Defend ECHO-4 as it hacks into the airwaves, but be careful. If the hack is interrupted, then you'll have to start over.

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 2F581DFE42DD3EB0648310A85D857670, Expand your reach with Silos! Re-activating decommissioned Order Silos will expand your hunt for Vault Key Fragments, and reward you with SDU Tokens.

expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, C1A14B6543AC60249C2E47A5A993500C, Activate one of the Order's decommissioned Silos by locating and hacking into its Command Console. Doing so will aid you in your hunt for Vault Key Fragments, further expand your Fast Travel network, and reward you with SDU Tokens.

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 4E5C7A1B4EA2B6B473B4ACA7135CA841, With the Silo's balloon deployed, the location of nearby Vault Key Fragments is now revealed. The balloon's tether also acts as a zipline! Get hunting, Vault Hunter!

expandedtutorialdef.header: ui_globals, EC6055B844D29C8037E1E79961898FE0, The hunt is on.
expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 1915AD0E48AA6A9AEDB1689348366A1F, With the Silo's balloon deployed, the location of nearby Vault Key Fragments is now revealed. You can also use the balloon tether as a zipline to launch yourself across long distances. Happy Hunting, Vault Hunter!

tutorialdef.header: ui_globals, A417A7EE45BC6C6093175D9671DE8A6D, It's crawling with spare parts!
tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, ACC1A9A6493C5143AF24788F3A776E8E, These ancient mecha beasts have just been left lying around! Bring a battery to the top of this abandoned Crawler to gain access to unique vehicle paintjobs.

expandedtutorialdef.header: ui_globals, 6362D2524794C687A961208DD04F61C9, It's crawling with spare parts!
expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 994D103F4907FE8FAC2BBD8D31FF598D, These ancient mecha beasts have just been left lying around! Bring a battery to the top of this abandoned Crawler to gain access to unique vehicle paintjobs!

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, DC09FAA5482B60137C11FF9F2B3F4317, The Augers have long since abandoned this mine, but that doesn't mean it's empty. Prepare to fight for any bounty it still holds for SDU tokens.

expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 3901432C46EF991D3D2787AD5B0C3262, The Augers have long since abandoned this mine, but that doesn't mean it's empty. Prepare to fight for any bounty it still holds for SDU tokens.

tutorialdef.header: ui_globals, 525CBA9B4FE1EA3C918D05A9618E6081, Now that's a Badass bunker!
tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 400F000F4AB55D7486D72EBF032C499B, The Order sealed this bunker up tight. Find a way to remove the Bio Armor on the door to enter, defeat what lies within and score SDU tokens.

expandedtutorialdef.header: ui_globals, 8FE68FC94FA44519FB6377B5F1857397, Now that's a Badass bunker!
expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 8B3119C043D8873CD0EA69853A70B66A, The Order sealed this bunker up tight. Find a way to remove the Bio Armor on the door to enter, defeat what lies within and score SDU tokens.

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 7AFE0B1C4F9D835A8000D58F3F23BDE2, The Ripper Queen has sent her vanguard out to find worthy recruits. Take down the rippers at this drill site to impede her efforts and earn SDU tokens!

expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, F7581EAF4D90F842D66AFE867C6511D8, The Ripper Queen has sent her vanguard out to find worthy recruits. Take down the rippers at this drill site to impede her efforts and earn SDU tokens!

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, E774B03949ADDC780A27A5B3C933FC01, Take on Contracts to help out the locals of Kairos and earn some gear! Contract Boards can be found at every safehouse.

expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 50DC28A04DF936846A112484600EB838, Take on Contracts to help out the locals of Kairos and earn some gear! Contract Boards can be found at every safehouse.

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 29DDAF1E4295597219839A8C4E93D3DB, Big Encore Bosses are a special version of a Moxxi's Big Encore boss where you can pay Eridium to fight a stronger version of the boss for better rewards.

expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, CEB070D24758141F6F0E05863A2C0BA4, Big Encore Bosses are a special version of a Moxxi's Big Encore boss where you can pay Eridium to fight a stronger version of the boss for better rewards.

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 7B7F7B9C49AF59D13A9532B39904397E, Spend Specilization Points to enhance your playstyle. You'll earn Specialization Points whenever any of your characters gain EXP and level up your Specialization Level.

expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 928E33CC45ADACDB539594A83398560F, Spend Specilization Points to enhance your playstyle. You'll earn Specialization Points whenever any of your characters gain EXP and level up your Specialization Level.

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 42565AF5428A1674DE55A2BCA0496667, Firmware allows you to build a Set bonus with several pieces of gear. Use Firmware Transfer to build your perfect loadout!

expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, C225F09A4331E139EA857EAAE0F85587, Firmware allows you to build a Set bonus with several pieces of gear. Use Firmware Transfer to build your perfect loadout!

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 06931B294790BC5996BA248B6A19C0E9, Ultimate Vault Hunter Levels will level up the world for a greater challenge. Earn higher UVH Levels by completing UVH Challenges.

expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 1944DD5C4898B038E7799EAED4EEDF18, Ultimate Vault Hunter Levels will level up the world for a greater challenge. Earn higher UVH Levels by completing UVH Challenges.

tutorialdef.header: ui_globals, F0879E85462465433FC70BA831129F22, Moxxi's Big Encore Machine
tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 7F66215445024CD2F79170AC520F8A85, After defeating a boss, you can use the Moxxi's Big Encore Machine to respawn the boss to fight them again!

expandedtutorialdef.header: ui_globals, FAF113C6495B317255E35DBFB01A0383, Moxxi's Big Encore Machine
expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 1F099FE84FD62769C242579DBA2B6779, After defeating a boss, you can use the Moxxi's Big Encore Machine to respawn the boss to fight them again!

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 04C672E44E45D32280283EA457FD00BA, You've received a Vault Signal. Check your map to see the area where the signal is coming from!

expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 906F73C04F637D0AB1216397B3A22F7E, When you receive a Vault Signal, it adds a hint area to your map and displays a Vault Tracker on your HUD to let you know how close you are to Vault Key Fragments and Vaults!

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, A35BFE2A4661A017F16FBA8261F78D6E, Maurice's Black Market Vending Machine features an exclusive selection of high-value gear, and its location changes weekly!

expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 7313F48F44ACE3DEAF6921AB3961E90B, Maurice's Black Market Vending Machine will respawn every week in a new location hidden throughout Kairos. [newline] Whenever it respawns, there will be a new selection of high-value gear to purchase, so check back often!

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 9E16B4084A56954478843FB45767A5FE, Wild Card Missions send the player on an augmented replay of a mission where enemies all spawn in with certain pool of traits. Complete these for special rewards!

expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 99F324E44F9C7B219000C5AB1755D81D, Wild Card Missions send the player on an augmented replay of a mission where enemies all spawn in with certain pool of traits. Complete these for special rewards!

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, B48766F34BA8ACE40FA6688C54DAE731, While in the air, use [glyph]action_crouch[/glyph][glyph]Action_CrouchOrDash[/glyph] to do a ground slam.

expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 342E79784EEDBCEA1D2DEFBE53CB57E5, While in the air, use [glyph]action_crouch[/glyph][glyph]Action_CrouchOrDash[/glyph] to do a ground slam.

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, D5E54D1E4A93CCFF2761C2AC250ADC8A, Ordonite Battery dispensers are now unlocked throughout Dominion City and can be used to uncover secrets and rewards.

expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 7BDF58264F7C2F90E59A64B3E5FD9FEF, Ordonite Battery dispensers are now unlocked throughout Dominion City and can be used to uncover secrets and rewards.

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, E7CF39E3411958A1B3FE4685E51FFC60, Locust Gas dispensers are now unlocked throughout Dominion City. Use them to destroy any Bio Armor covering secrets and rewards.

expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 413348BC49D27BFA62EEB0912BD7E450, Locust Gas dispensers are now unlocked throughout Dominion City. Use them to destroy any Bio Armor covering secrets and rewards.

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 32D50093404D304CC63CD1834E8CD583, Sewer doors are now unlocked throughout Dominion City. Explore the sewers to uncover secrets and rewards.

expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, FDC54DB04DF282B8BB41038F59073166, Sewer doors are now unlocked throughout Dominion City. Explore the sewers to uncover secrets and rewards.

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, EA84912C491D6DECA7D7D6B8DC706C24, When (not if) you die, you'll be reconstructed at a station just like this one.

expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 68CDE0F14EA982681C1DFD9359627D69, Reconstruction isn't free! It costs a small fee to bring you back and give you another go, so try not to make it a habit. You can always check your map to see which station you most recently visited.

tutorialdef.header: ui_globals, 58F2D138402FB8BB92349496F1303749, Ultimate Vault Hunter Mode Unlocked!
tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 06E14E0240B6851335E6D6B4166C4B93, Congratulations, badass! You've unlocked [primary]Ultimate Vault Hunter mode[/primary]! Your session's difficulty has been upgraded to [primary]UVH Rank 1[/primary] automatically. [newline][newline]Each [primary]UVH Rank[/primary] grants you access to [boldtext]additional Firmware[/boldtext], [boldtext]better loot[/boldtext], and [boldtext]tougher enemies[/boldtext]. You can unlock 6 additional ranks by completing the new [primary]Ultimate Vault Hunter Challenges[/primary] found in your [boldtext]Challenge Log[/boldtext]. You can raise or lower your difficulty mode at any time via the [boldtext]Session Settings[/boldtext] menu.

expandedtutorialdef.header: ui_globals, B2B412B54039CF2A02D3B3A0ADADAA8D, Ultimate Vault Hunter Mode Unlocked!
expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 53DD4B1B494F5E913495469D393E598A, Congratulations, badass! You've unlocked [primary]Ultimate Vault Hunter mode[/primary]! Your session's difficulty has been upgraded to [primary]UVH Rank 1[/primary] automatically. [newline][newline]Each [primary]UVH Rank[/primary] grants you access to [boldtext]additional Firmware[/boldtext], [boldtext]better loot[/boldtext], and [boldtext]tougher enemies[/boldtext]. You can unlock 6 additional ranks by completing the new [primary]Ultimate Vault Hunter Challenges[/primary] found in your [boldtext]Challenge Log[/boldtext]. You can raise or lower your difficulty mode at any time via the [boldtext]Session Settings[/boldtext] menu.

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 8150AB864FD39304FE1FA39368AD72BA, Completing Activities, like capturing Safehouses, will reward you with Storage Deck Upgrade (or SDU) Tokens. Use them to expand your Inventory!

expandedtutorialdef.header: ui_globals, FBB39BC8472C2709E9674F8C92E56558, Spend'em If You Got'em
expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 46F90E93488CA049065A2189393A17B6, Completing Activities, like unlocking Safehouses, will reward you with Storage Deck Upgrade (or SDU) Tokens. Use them to expand your Inventory!

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 932467334D3762B1C934F3914EF37A1B, You can use the tether on Silo's ballon to zipline, glide, and explore Kairos. Use the Grapple Grabber to latch on to ZipJet at the base of the tether!

expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 93542D784EF57BAECD3BC1A88DE04365, You can use the tether on Silo's ballon to zipline, glide, and explore Kairos. Use the Grapple Grabber to latch on to ZipJet at the base of the tether!

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, EB00411E418C7711061A11B3C72613AD, Congratulations on unlocking your first Action Skill. These are powerful abilities unique to your character. Use [glyph]action_statusmenu[/glyph] to open the ECHO Menu, then navigate to your Skills menu and select an Action Skill.

expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 5601B433440C446FEBB0AAA9C8936453, Congratulations on unlocking your first Action Skill. These are powerful abilities unique to your character. Use [glyph]action_statusmenu[/glyph] to open the ECHO Menu, then navigate to your Skills menu and select an Action Skill.

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 7B9C20AE4A1D62AE8DD931B05C74B409, Repkits can heal you when your Health is low, among other effects. Use [glyph]action_repairkit[/glyph] to use your repkit!

expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 1640E441455A4115301813AF5EE003F4, Repkits can Heal you when your Health is low, among other effects. Use [glyph]action_repairkit[/glyph] to use your repkit!

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, A591FFAE45CC8DAA993988881E47F048, Your ECHO-4 can now create a Digirunner for you to cross Kairos in. Use [glyph]action_summonpersonalvehicle[/glyph] to digistruct your own personal vehicle!

expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 3545E05943D34F3C7B0F9CB7E49550C6, Your ECHO-4 can now create a Digirunner for you to cross Kairos in. Use [glyph]action_summonpersonalvehicle[/glyph] to digistruct your own personal vehicle!

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, A8709D3D42D5832755D4ECB8346D1326, Refund your build progression at any Respecialization Machine to respec Skill and/or Specialization trees!

expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, EB0D66AE4C2067BEE59D68AC04FB664C, Refund your build progression at any Respecialization Machine to respec Skill and/or Specialization trees!

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 9CDD2DA74BECD9DA3DD6A4A0D49D0791, Press and hold [glyph]Action_Jump_HoldToGlide[/glyph] while jumping to begin a Glide.

expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 1D63C8604690C156247256A0D05E451E, Press and hold [glyph]Action_Jump_HoldToGlide[/glyph] while jumping to begin a Glide.

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 0CBB524542A082E264F01B9A49089DD3, You have gained access to the ancient Auger Mines. Search Kairos for their hidden entrances to defeat their threats, and earn SDU Tokens.

expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, CE842E4D4A326C06D0486B9743A34A77, You have gained access to the ancient Auger Mines. Search Kairos for their hidden entrances to defeat their threats, and earn SDU Tokens.

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, CEFBD46548FDD27C85EA9390A3E172E2, You have gained access to the decommisioned Order Bunkers. Use Locust Canisters to bypass their Bio-Armored doors, defeat their threats, and earn SDU Tokens.

expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, CB01BC2B4A710B42FFD3F3972128DD16, You have gained access to the decommisioned Order Bunkers. Use Locust Canisters to bypass their Bio-Armored doors, defeat their threats, and earn SDU Tokens.

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 138F31A84699CED302151FA6382990E6, By Order of Idolator Sol, this area is off-limits.

expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, F92F263140275EF368A5B0B3F6C2C29E, By Order of Idolator Sol, this area is off-limits. You want in? You're going to have to take it up with him directly!

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 74A076D14948621F073C87977492F652, Find your clave and earn your name before returning here.

expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 9103DAC84C12849DACD4E3A541A2B02A, The Augers are an insular people who guard their secrets well. Find your clave and your name before returning here.

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 231114E741FB5A3FF2728BA196342684, If you want these goods, you're going to have to fight for them.

expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 01B24269463FE1BEE3B69C9C318B721B, If you want these goods, you're going to have to fight for them. Survive several waves of combat to reap the rewards locked inside.

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, B4E1992B4653969B5DAD0F8EEB119C62, You've unlocked Ultimate Vault Hunter Level 1. Additional difficulty levels can be unlocked by completing the UVHM challenges in your Challenge Log.

expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 649D48FE45FE38DC9884C2BD378DCED9, Congratulations! You've unlocked Ultimate Vault Hunter Level 1. Additional difficulty levels can be unlocked by completing the UVHM challenges in your Challenge Log. You can leave Ultimate Vault Hunter mode by accessing the Session settings and lowering the difficulty to a standard difficulty.

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 21C3A0394C75D7E51D63969B3F217C83, Free movement across Kairos has been locked down by edict of the Timekeeper. Ascension-level security access required.

expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 877F84DC4D7724D22ECD49B0F2F112B5, Free movement across Kairos has been locked down by edict of the Timekeeper. Ascension-level security access required.

tutorialdef.header: ui_globals, 60D54B864306700F6132B5AE3823B82C, Ultimate Vault Hunter Mode Unlocked!

expandedtutorialdef.header: ui_globals, 4C7C907D47D32CD4B52369B191F23672, Ultimate Vault Hunter Mode Unlocked!
expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 663AA045446C98E2F7BFEC8BBC464362, [newline][newline]Kairos' biggest and most rewarding fights change weekly, so check the [boldtext]Map[/boldtext] menu to see the newest [primary]Weekly Wildcard Mission[/primary] and [primary]Weekly Big Encore Boss[/primary]. [primary]Weekly Wildcard Missions[/primary] will always reward you a specific piece of [rarity_legendary]Legendary gear[/rarity_legendary] for that week. [primary]Weekly Big Encore Boss[/primary] fights cost [nowrap][eridium][rarity_epic]Eridium[/rarity_epic][/nowrap] and feature a higher dedicated loot drop rate. [newline][newline]And don't forget to search out [boldtext]Maurice's Black Market Vending Machine[/boldtext] to see what new gear is available week to week!

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, B771215D4173B4988F9513BCF29A3B98, Use [glyph]Action_Melee[/glyph] to punch!

expandedtutorialdef.text: ui_globals, C46581D64C059978872050ACFBA9B262, Use [glyph]Action_Melee[/glyph] to punch! There's a whole universe full of things you haven't punched!

tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, D56F22DF4F61849C31D4AFBB1C6B7D3D, Dahl's loss is your gain! Find and open caches of loot around the Whispering Glacier!
ui_globals, A0DDB53B466389E040E2DEA2ABD4B4DE, Re-form the fractured record pieces and play them on the Eldritch Phonograph to gain dark knowledge.
ui_globals, AC02809D447F30DEA18E51A6613D746D, Revenants and madmen have scratched symbols across the glacier. Find them all!
ui_globals, BD89D68943AF6AA92C7EA0907070BEFA, Toss dynamite into a viable Ice Fishing location and see what pops out! Happy blasting!

tutorialdef.header: ui_globals, EFEBCD334A4E7CEC52FE52B1190E4B88, Get back in the fight!
tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, 76726A074F15DE44120514888CD62C4A, Pulling the knife switch spawns a badass in the arena. If it's taken down, you'll rejoin the fight!

tutorialdef.header: ui_globals, 28700381402F28F44BCDF8B7172F9A8C, Go big or go home!
tutorialdef.text: ui_globals, C2A713224E9AAB3310D35ABAA2236012, Cash out and leave with everything you've earned so far or risk it all to earn even more loot!

graphicssettings.antialiasingdisablemessage: ui_globals, 7FF41DE54FF993C5615ECB9FA34D3222, AntiAliasing method is overriden by the selected upscaling method.
graphicssettings.upscalingqualitydisablemessage: ui_globals, 7BBEDACF4535DC3CA2554ABA05C4A205, Upscaling quality is overriden to full resolution when no upscaling method are selected.

graphicssettings.multiframegenerationdisablemessage: ui_globals, 3A2A8BF145C66B71FFD0BD9291680A45, Multi-frame generation is disabled when frame generation is disabled.
graphicssettings.nvidiareflexdisablemessage: ui_globals, 22B8C33E4ABF8D35042796946287140C, NVIDIA Reflex is always enabled when frame generation is in use.
graphicssettings.spatialupscaledisablemessage: ui_globals, 34CEA915796541EFA6F8643A4B7AA15F, Spatial Upscaling is only available for TSR
